requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — NSI Conformity and Namibia Site Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——NSI合格评定及纳米比亚场站验收
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——NSI合格評定及納米比亞場站驗收

summary.en: For Namibia, EV charger safety evidence should be built around IEC-family EVSE standards where NSI, the project owner, utility, lender, or installer adopts or references IEC standards. IEC 61851-1 is the international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements, including control pilot behavior, protective earthing, interlocks, overcurrent protection, residual-current protection strategy, temperature limits, and safety shutdown. IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV supply equipment. Outdoor Namibia installations also need enclosure, corrosion, dust, UV exposure, and thermal derating review because high ambient temperature and solar exposure can reduce charger output and component life. As of 2026-06-14, a standalone official Namibia EVSE type-approval rule was not confirmed from official sources; project specifications and NSI/utility acceptance therefore become the practical safety gate.
summary.zh: 对于纳米比亚，电动汽车充电桩安全证据应围绕IEC体系EVSE标准建立，尤其是在NSI、项目业主、公用事业单位、贷款方或安装方采纳或引用IEC标准时。IEC 61851-1是传导式EV供电设备通用要求的国际基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、互锁、过流保护、剩余电流保护策略、温度限值和安全停机。IEC 61851-23适用于直流EV供电设备。纳米比亚户外安装还需要审查外壳、防腐、防尘、紫外暴露和热降额，因为高环境温度和太阳直晒会降低充电桩输出及部件寿命。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认纳米比亚存在独立EVSE整机型式批准规则；因此项目规格及NSI/公用事业验收成为实际安全门槛。
summary.zht: 對於納米比亞，電動汽車充電樁安全證據應圍繞IEC體系EVSE標準建立，尤其是在NSI、項目業主、公用事業單位、貸款方或安裝方採納或引用IEC標準時。IEC 61851-1是傳導式EV供電設備通用要求的國際基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、互鎖、過流保護、剩餘電流保護策略、溫度限值和安全停機。IEC 61851-23適用於直流EV供電設備。納米比亞戶外安裝還需要審查外殼、防腐、防塵、紫外暴露和熱降額，因為高環境溫度和太陽直曬會降低充電樁輸出及部件壽命。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認納米比亞存在獨立EVSE整機型式批准規則；因此項目規格及NSI/公用事業驗收成為實際安全門檻。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code), where required by site specification
NSI standards and conformity assessment framework for standards-based solutions
NamPower, RED, municipal, project-owner, and electrical-contractor installation acceptance requirements

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which addresses conductive charging system general requirements but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication assumptions. GB/T 18487 evidence can support engineering review, but it is not the same as IEC 61851 test evidence for a Namibia project requiring IEC documentation, especially after a connector change from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，涉及传导式充电系统通用要求，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信假设。GB/T 18487证据可支持工程审查，但在纳米比亚项目要求IEC文件时，尤其是在接口从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196后，其并不等同于IEC 61851测试证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，涉及傳導式充電系統通用要求，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊假設。GB/T 18487證據可支持工程審查，但在納米比亞項目要求IEC文件時，尤其是在接口從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196後，其並不等同於IEC 61851測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC equipment, protective-device ratings, residual-current protection design, IP and mechanical protection evidence where specified, installation instructions, and high-temperature derating reports for Namibia climate. If the China design uses GB/T connectors, the safety file must be updated after the IEC 62196 connector redesign. A standalone GB/T 18487 report should not be presented as complete IEC 61851 evidence.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流设备IEC 61851-23证据、保护器件额定值、剩余电流保护设计、在规定时提供IP及机械防护证据、安装说明，以及针对纳米比亚气候的高温降额报告。若中国设计使用GB/T接口，则在IEC 62196接口重新设计后必须更新安全文件。不应将单独的GB/T 18487报告作为完整IEC 61851证据提交。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流設備IEC 61851-23證據、保護器件額定值、剩餘電流保護設計、在規定時提供IP及機械防護證據、安裝說明，以及針對納米比亞氣候的高溫降額報告。若中國設計使用GB/T接口，則在IEC 62196接口重新設計後必須更新安全文件。不應將單獨的GB/T 18487報告作為完整IEC 61851證據提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by NSI conformity treatment, utility/site approval, tender, lender, installer, or project-owner specification; exact Namibia statutory EVSE product-safety route should be verified with NSI for the specific product
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Namibia without a clause-level gap assessment and additional testing where required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Namibia-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851 evidence, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence where applicable, enclosure and protection evidence, and high-temperature derating review before site acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向纳米比亚的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851证据、适用时的直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、外壳及保护证据，以及场站验收前的高温降额审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向納米比亞的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851證據、適用時的直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、外殼及保護證據，以及場站驗收前的高溫降額審查。
